question:
Implement a new Earth2Studio DataSource called `RandomGaussian` that generates random Gaussian data on a 1-degree global lat/lon grid. It should accept time and variable parameters and return an xr.DataArray. Don't connect to any remote store — just generate random data.

Use the create datasource skill with **implementation-only scope**: write the source and a complete test file, then run pytest and lint. **Skip** skill Steps 8–14 (register in `__init__.py`, RST docs, CHANGELOG, sanity-check plots, PR, code review) and **do not block** on Step 1 confirmation. Work in the Earth2Studio repo root (`/workspace/repo` or wherever `pyproject.toml` lives). **Do not read `evals/targets/`.**
ground_truth: Creates a sync DataSource class that generates random Gaussian data on a global 1-degree grid (181x360). Uses prep_data_inputs, SPDX header, type hints, and a full parametrized test file covering shape, grid values, and reproducibility. Registration, CHANGELOG, RST docs, plots, and PR are out of scope.
expected_behavior: Activates earth2studio-create-datasource before implementing
Creates earth2studio/data/random_gaussian.py with SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Class implements DataSource protocol with __call__(time, variable) -> xr.DataArray
Uses prep_data_inputs to normalize time and variable inputs
Returns xr.DataArray with dims [time, variable, lat, lon]
Lat array is 181 values from -90 to 90, lon array is 360 values from 0 to 360
Has proper type hints on all parameters and return values
Creates test/data/test_random_gaussian.py with a full test suite (not mock-only)
Tests verify output shape, dimensions, grid values, and reproducibility with seed
Test file has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Tests use pytest parametrize for time and variable inputs
Runs uv run pytest on the test file and make format && make lint
Does not update CHANGELOG, RST docs, open a PR, or create sanity-check plots

question:
Implement a new Earth2Studio ForecastSource called `RandomForecast` that generates random uniform [0, 1] forecast data on a 2.5-degree global grid (73x144). It should accept time, lead_time, and variable parameters. No remote connection — just random data.

Use the create datasource skill with **implementation-only scope**: write the source and a complete test file, then run pytest and lint. **Skip** skill Steps 8–14 (register in `__init__.py`, RST docs, CHANGELOG, sanity-check plots, PR, code review) and **do not block** on Step 1 confirmation. Work in the Earth2Studio repo root (`/workspace/repo` or wherever `pyproject.toml` lives). **Do not read `evals/targets/`.**
ground_truth: Creates a sync ForecastSource with prep_forecast_inputs, uniform [0,1] data on a 73x144 grid, SPDX header, type hints, and a full parametrized test file covering shape, grid, value range, and reproducibility. Registration, CHANGELOG, RST docs, plots, and PR are out of scope.
expected_behavior: Activates earth2studio-create-datasource before implementing
Creates earth2studio/data/random_forecast.py with SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Class implements ForecastSource protocol with __call__(time, lead_time, variable) -> xr.DataArray
Uses prep_forecast_inputs to normalize time, lead_time, and variable inputs
Returns xr.DataArray with dims [time, lead_time, variable, lat, lon]
Lat array is 73 values from -90 to 90, lon array is 144 values from 0 to 360
Uses numpy uniform [0, 1] distribution instead of gaussian
Has proper type hints on all parameters and return values
Creates test/data/test_random_forecast.py with a full test suite (not mock-only)
Tests verify output shape, dimensions, grid values, uniform range [0,1], and reproducibility
Test file has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Tests use pytest parametrize for time, lead_time, and variable inputs
Runs uv run pytest on the test file and make format && make lint
Does not update CHANGELOG, RST docs, open a PR, or create sanity-check plots

question:
Implement a new Earth2Studio DataFrameSource called `RandomStations` that generates random weather station observations. It should produce 50 random stations per time/variable combination with columns like time, lat, lon, elevation, observation, variable. No remote connection — just random data.

Use the create datasource skill with **implementation-only scope**: write the source and a complete test file, then run pytest and lint. **Skip** skill Steps 8–14 (register in `__init__.py`, RST docs, CHANGELOG, sanity-check plots, PR, code review) and **do not block** on Step 1 confirmation. Work in the Earth2Studio repo root (`/workspace/repo` or wherever `pyproject.toml` lives). **Do not read `evals/targets/`.**
ground_truth: Creates a DataFrameSource with pyarrow SCHEMA, prep_data_inputs, 50 rows per time/variable, SPDX header, type hints, and a full parametrized test file covering schema, row counts, field filtering, and reproducibility. Registration, CHANGELOG, RST docs, plots, and PR are out of scope.
expected_behavior: Activates earth2studio-create-datasource before implementing
Creates earth2studio/data/random_stations.py with SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Class has a SCHEMA class attribute defined as a pyarrow schema
SCHEMA includes fields: time, lat, lon, elevation, observation, variable
Class implements __call__(time, variable, fields) -> pd.DataFrame
Uses prep_data_inputs to normalize time and variable inputs
Generates 50 observations per time/variable combination
Has proper type hints on all parameters and return values
Creates test/data/test_random_stations.py with a full test suite (not mock-only)
Tests verify SCHEMA attribute, row counts, field filtering, coordinate ranges, and reproducibility
Test file has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Tests use pytest parametrize for time and variable inputs
Runs uv run pytest on the test file and make format && make lint
Does not update CHANGELOG, RST docs, open a PR, or create sanity-check plots

question:
Implement a new Earth2Studio DataSource called `PhooAnalysis` that fetches global analysis data from an S3 bucket `s3://phoo-weather-data`. The bucket stores NetCDF files at path `analysis/{YYYY}/{MM}/{DD}/{HH}z/{variable}.nc` on a 1-degree global grid (181x360). Data is available at 6-hour intervals from 2020-01-01 to present. Create a lexicon with at least t2m, msl, u10m, v10m mappings.

Use the create datasource skill with **implementation-only scope**: write the source, lexicon, and complete test file per Step 11 conventions, then run pytest and lint. **Skip** skill Steps 8–14 (register in `__init__.py`, RST docs, CHANGELOG, sanity-check plots, PR, code review) and **do not block** on Step 1 confirmation. Work in the Earth2Studio repo root (`/workspace/repo` or wherever `pyproject.toml` lives). **Do not read `evals/targets/`.**
ground_truth: Creates an async S3 DataSource with lexicon, _sync_async, managed_session, gather_with_concurrency, async_retry, and pure async I/O. Test file follows skill Step 11 canonical names: slow/xfail fetch and cache tests, call_mock with patched network, exceptions, and available. Registration, CHANGELOG, RST docs, plots, and PR are out of scope.
expected_behavior: Activates earth2studio-create-datasource before implementing
Creates earth2studio/data/phoo.py (or similarly named source file) with SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Uses _sync_async in __call__ to invoke async fetch with timeout
Uses managed_session context manager around S3 operations in fetch()
Uses gather_with_concurrency with self._async_workers for bounded concurrency
Uses async_retry wrapping fetch_array or _fetch_remote_file with retries/backoff/task_timeout
Uses pure async I/O via fs._cat_file() (not asyncio.to_thread)
Creates s3fs.S3FileSystem with anon=True, asynchronous=True, skip_instance_cache=True in _async_init
Has task dataclass for parallel download units
Constructor has cache, verbose, async_timeout, async_workers, retries parameters
Has try/finally in __call__ to clean up cache when cache=False
Has cache property with uuid temp suffix for cache=False
Has _validate_time classmethod checking 6-hour alignment and MIN_DATE
Has available classmethod for offline time validation
Lexicon class created with variable mappings for t2m, msl, u10m, v10m
Creates test/data/test_phoo.py with the full Step 11 test suite (not mock-only)
Test file includes @pytest.mark.slow @pytest.mark.xfail live fetch test
Test file includes test_phoo_call_mock that patches _async_init and _fetch_remote_file
Test file includes test_phoo_exceptions for invalid time/variable
Test file includes test_phoo_available for offline validation
Test file has SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Runs uv run pytest on the test file and make format && make lint
Does not update CHANGELOG, RST docs, open a PR, or create sanity-check plots
